Title: Cylinder Density
Description: The Cylinder generates a cylindrical shape, crazy I know. You can spin it by giving it a new Y axis and a spin angle (in degrees).

Options.Label: Spin
Options.Description: Determines the angle in degrees by which to spin the Ellipsoid around its original Y axis.

Outputs.Label: AxialCurve
Outputs.Description: Maps the Distance from the Cylinder’s XZ-plane to a Density value.

Outputs.Label: RadialCurve
Outputs.Description: Maps the Distance from the Cylinder’s Y axis to a Density value.

Outputs.Label: NewYAxis
Outputs.Description: In combination with the spin, this lets you rotate the Cylinder around its origin by aligning its original Y-axis with the provided one.
